notice: GENERATED CODE - DO NOT MODIFY BY HAND.

feature.name: Member Onboarding
feature.description: Orchestrates the logged-out Start welcome projection, standard booking-identity onboarding, social-profile completion, run-preference completion, draft resumption, photo/profile decisions, and route handoff.

actionScope.included: Welcome choices; step-back navigation; date, gender, interest, Instagram, photo, prompt, and running-preference decisions; booking-identity save; social-profile completion; and run-preference completion.
excluded: Raw name, phone, Instagram-handle, and prompt-answer character entry remains form data governed by field formatters, validators, and profile data contracts rather than separately cardinalized keystrokes.
Initial entry-mode resolution, draft hydration, best-effort draft persistence/deletion, provider invalidation, and router resume redirects are lifecycle effects rather than user actions.
Photo picking/cropping inside ProfilePhotoEditor retains that child workflow's ownership; this feature owns opening the editor plus direct delete/reorder actions.

actions.description: Skips the welcome reel and reveals its calls to action.
Opens shared Phone Authentication while preserving the sanitized return destination.
Leaves onboarding for guest-readable organizer and event discovery.
Moves to the previous step without crossing the active entry mode's minimum back boundary.
Selects a date of birth within the validated adult date range.
Validates name, date of birth, and verified phone fields, saves the draft, and advances to identity preferences.
Selects one gender from the finite profile gender domain.
Selects a non-empty subset of the finite profile gender domain.
Persists the required booking identity, clears its draft, and lets the router resume the pending destination.
Normalizes the optional Instagram handle, saves the draft, and advances to photos when the orphaned Instagram step is manually reached.
Clears the optional Instagram handle and advances to photos when the orphaned Instagram step is manually reached.
Opens the shared photo editor for an empty or populated onboarding photo slot.
Deletes one profile photo while preserving the minimum-photo policy.
Reorders profile photos and therefore changes their presentation order.
Advances after the minimum photo count is met and all uploads have settled.
Selects a unique prompt from the finite prompt catalog for one answer slot.
Persists three completed prompt answers, marks the social profile complete, clears its draft, and resumes the pending route.
Adjusts the bounded preferred pace range.
Selects an optional subset of supported preferred distances.
Selects an optional subset of supported running reasons.
Selects an optional subset of supported run times.
Persists the current run-preference version, clears its draft, and resumes the pending route.

evidenceExceptions.reason: These deterministic onboarding states have registered capture and Widgetbook evidence but no focused state-level test recorded by the screen authority.

actionScope.included: Skipping the animated welcome reel, continuing to shared phone authentication, and entering guest-readable Explore.
excluded: Automatic reel completion and immediate landing for capture or reduced-motion mode are animation lifecycle transitions, not user actions.
Welcome-impression and CTA analytics remain action side effects rather than separately cardinalized actions.
Phone Authentication and Explore own all behavior after their route handoffs.

actions.description: Skips the active object reel and begins the landed CTA reveal.
Opens shared Phone Authentication while preserving the current Start location as the sanitized return destination.
Leaves the Start route for guest-readable organizer and event discovery.
